title: fix: check disk budget in WritePair to prevent quota exceeded errors
body:
## Summary

Fixes #503 errors caused by WritePair writing without checking available disk space.

- Add budget check before writing summary and raw files
- Return descriptive error when budget would be exceeded
- Existing Stats() method reused for current usage

## Test plan
- [ ] Unit tests for budget enforcement
- [ ] Integration test with simulated full disk
